subcodes.first_line: The Most Luminous Pen maketh mention of them that gaze upon the Most Exalted Horizon, and saith: O friends! On this day must all, through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم ابهی ناظران افق اعلی را ذکر مینماید و میفرماید ای دوستان باید الیوم کل بعنایت
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
